ma":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"85"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032301335718CDC1884596DD2B4B2B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":11557,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":208},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7340075101973250841","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"传统意义上的真正西幻穿越小说以前或者有现在很少了，主角的性格塑造真的很完美非常贴近普通人，另外人的所为从一开始便是贪欲的理解但也不可否认人性的美好与勇敢，我看到了一个弱小的渣虫在经历了离奇重新感受温暖获得家人之后自己与自己的战斗心与心的抗争勇于而上的弱者，也有大纲题材的原因没有经验和文笔是写不出的，中心都在围绕“自己”也充分表达了“人”希望他和它都能有一个美好只属于自己的美好结局。","text_exts":[{"e":44,"s":41,"text":"普通人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774200837DD2B4B2B%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227340075101973250841%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227321770862535773246%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1708997841,"group_id":"7321770862535773246","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"感觉好玩所以写的随意想写啥写啥","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5gqaS+2PT+miZf+kvpsFp0=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787248&x-signature=NtetCP%2BD2YPkYr6bl%2BJMa04hBGU%3D","user_id":"431437192628291","user_name":"非常好奇的南条"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4314
